problem id: a46d71d0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11010001 -> 01100000
  10100111 -> 11000011
  10111111 -> 00000111
  00110011 -> 00000001
  11111010 -> 00101101
  01101001 -> 10110100
  10110010 -> 01001001
  10010110 -> 01001011

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 01000011
